diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Deep venous thrombosis right arm basilic/cephalic, abdominal abscess, ESRD, encapsulating peritoneal sclerosis, malnutrition, depression abdominal incision wound, hypothyroid
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with septic shock, free intrabdominal air, and diffuse abdominal tenderness, all of which were significant findings that pointed towards a perforated viscus. A CT scan confirmed the presence of intrabdominal free air and increased ascites.
